generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? By investing in strategic autonomy, we can protect our critical infrastructure and ensure that our nation remains resilient in the face of emerging threats. Don't let our dependence on others put us at risk. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
